## Summary

- 

## Change type

- [ ] Flow definition
- [ ] Schema
- [ ] Tooling
- [ ] Docs/process
- [ ] Optional consumer adapter contract
- [ ] Example or run bundle

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated docs when command, process, or compatibility behavior changed.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-facing changes.
- [ ] Ran `flowctl validate`.
- [ ] Ran `flowctl validate-event examples/`.
- [ ] Ran `flowctl validate-run examples/runs/`.
- [ ] Ran `flowctl validate-samples`.
- [ ] Ran `flowctl report`.
- [ ] Ran `pytest`.
- [ ] Confirmed independent optional consumers are not described as already integrated.
